zh.title: Solana/美元技术分析：短线承压回调延续整理
zh.content:
SOL当前处于短线回调后的弱势震荡格局，价格跌破20日均线后承压运行，整体动能偏空，但尚未形成加速下跌结构，短期或延续整理态势观望

技术指标显示MACD维持负值且动能柱走弱，短期卖压占优；价格位于20日均线下方，反弹缺乏量能配合，RSI暂缺但趋势偏弱

下方关键支撑位于71.8附近，若跌破或进一步下探70整数关口；上方阻力集中在73.6及20日均线73.1一带，需关注破位风险

操作上建议以反弹逢高减仓或短线高抛为主，未站稳20日均线前不宜激进做多，可等待企稳信号再布局控制仓位与风险执行纪律

en.title: Solana vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
Solana against the US dollar is currently showing a mild short-term bearish bias after failing to sustain momentum above recent intraday highs. Price action around 72.01 reflects a market that has slipped below its 20-period simple moving average, suggesting weakening trend strength. The structure over the past sessions indicates a consolidation phase between 71.80 and 73.65, with sellers gradually gaining control as higher highs fail to extend meaningfully. Overall trend remains neutral-to-bearish in the immediate term.

Momentum indicators reinforce the bearish tilt, with MACD currently printing a negative value at -0.134, signaling continued downside pressure and a lack of bullish crossover support. The absence of an available RSI reading limits precision, but price behavior below the SMA(20) at 73.074 suggests persistent weakness in short-term momentum. Typically, when price trades under this moving average while MACD remains negative, rallies tend to face rejection unless volume improves significantly.

Key support is now forming near the recent intraday low around 71.81, a level that has repeatedly attracted buying interest and prevented deeper breakdowns. A loss of this zone would expose downside risk toward the psychological 70.00 handle. On the upside, immediate resistance sits at the SMA(20) near 73.07, followed by the swing high at 73.65. A breakout above this range would be required to re-establish bullish momentum and shift sentiment.

Short-term traders may consider range-bound strategies, favoring sell entries near resistance while maintaining tight risk control above 73.65. Momentum remains fragile, so breakout confirmation is necessary before positioning for trend continuation. A sustained move above the SMA(20) could open a path toward 75, while failure to hold 71.80 may accelerate downside toward 70.00. Overall, patience is advised until clearer directional conviction emerges from volume expansion or a decisive moving average reclaim.
